## Instruction File Lookup

- For dependency and version reference, use .github/instructions/package.instructions.md.
- For overview and relation map, use .github/instructions/project-structure-patterns.instructions.md.
- For component module and folder rules, use .github/instructions/component-structure.instructions.md.
- For response/request/mapper/model contracts, use .github/instructions/type-contracts.instructions.md.
- For service layer rules, use .github/instructions/service-patterns.instructions.md.
- For query hook/key/timing rules, use .github/instructions/query-patterns.instructions.md.
- For Zustand store and query-sync rules, use .github/instructions/store-patterns.instructions.md.
- For auth flow, token refresh, route protection, and role-based access rules, use .github/instructions/auth-and-routing.instructions.md.
